section_miscategorizations.text: A negative vaginal exam was performed.
section_miscategorizations.reason: While exam findings belong in Findings, a vaginal exam is anatomically incongruent with the rest of the renal/urinary workup in this male-appearing patient (referred to as 'He'), which could confuse readers. However, it is still technically an exam finding, so this is an organizational/clinical coherence issue rather than a true section misplacement.
